title: Repair and overhaul bicycle steering systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair and overhaul bicycle steering systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair and overhaul bicycle steering system

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and other relevant technical information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair and overhaul bicycle steering system

elements.title: Inspect steering system

pcs.text: Check bicycle steering system for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and by comparison of measurements against manufacturer specifications2.2 Identify, document and cost repair and replacement options for customer approval according to workplace procedures2.3 Prepare work area, replacement parts and bicycle for repair work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check bicycle steering system for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and by comparison of measurements against manufacturer specifications2.2 Identify, document and cost repair and replacement options for customer approval according to workplace procedures2.3 Prepare work area, replacement parts and bicycle for repair work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check bicycle steering system for faults and worn or damaged components using visual inspection methods and by comparison of measurements against manufacturer specifications2.2 Identify, document and cost repair and replacement options for customer approval according to workplace procedures2.3 Prepare work area, replacement parts and bicycle for repair work.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect steering system

elements.title: Carry out repair and overhaul of steering system

pcs.text: Carry out repair and overhaul activities according to workplace procedures, work plan, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Check and fit required replacement parts according to manufacturer specifications 3.3 Check and test repaired steering system for required operation according to manufacturer specifications3.4 Adjust repaired steering system and align as required according to workplace procedures3.5 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out repair and overhaul activities according to workplace procedures, work plan, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Check and fit required replacement parts according to manufacturer specifications 3.3 Check and test repaired steering system for required operation according to manufacturer specifications3.4 Adjust repaired steering system and align as required according to workplace procedures3.5 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out repair and overhaul activities according to workplace procedures, work plan, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Check and fit required replacement parts according to manufacturer specifications 3.3 Check and test repaired steering system for required operation according to manufacturer specifications3.4 Adjust repaired steering system and align as required according to workplace procedures3.5 Report results and quality issues to authorised personnel as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out repair and overhaul of steering system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
